text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, January 05. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
